def RGB_to_Hex(RGB):
    color = '#'
    for i in RGB:
        num = int(i)
        # 将R、G、B分别转化为16进制拼接转换并大写  hex() 函数用于将10进制整数转换成16进制，以字符串形式表示
        color += str(hex(num))[-2:].replace('x', '0').upper()
    return color
def chinese(string):
    """
    检查整个字符串是否包含中文
    :param string: 需要检查的字符串
    :return: bool
    """
    flag = False
    for ch in string:
        if u'\u4e00' <= ch <= u'\u9fff':
            flag = True
    return flag
def lenth(string):
    ans = 0
    for i in string:
        if chinese(i) == False:
            ans+=0.5
        else:
            ans+=1
    return ans
def show_code(text,movey):
    wordx=20
    wordy=45+movey
    for i in text:
        if i!= "\n":
            screen.blit(pygame.font.SysFont(FONTNAME,20).render(i,True,(0,0,0)),(wordx,wordy))
        if chinese(i) == False:
            wordx+=10
        else:
            wordx+=20
        if i == "\n":
            wordy+=20
            wordx=20

class InputBox:

    def __init__(self, x, y, w, h, text=''):
        self.rect = pg.Rect(x, y, w, h)
        self.color = COLOR_INACTIVE
        self.text = text
        self.txt_surface = FONT.render(text, True, self.color)
        self.active = False

    def handle_event(self, event):
        if event.type == pg.MOUSEBUTTONDOWN:
            # If the user clicked on the input_box rect.
            if self.rect.collidepoint(event.pos):
                # Toggle the active variable.
                self.active = not self.active
            else:
                self.active = False
            # Change the current color of the input box.
            self.color = COLOR_ACTIVE if self.active else COLOR_INACTIVE
        if event.type == pg.KEYDOWN:
            if self.active:
                # if event.key == pg.K_RETURN:
                #     print(self.text)
                #     self.text = ''
                if event.key == pg.K_BACKSPACE:
                    self.text = self.text[:-1]
                else:
                    self.text += event.unicode
                # Re-render the text.
                self.txt_surface = FONT.render(self.text, True, self.color)

    def update(self,but):
        # Resize the box if the text is too long.
        width = max(200, self.txt_surface.get_width()+10)
        self.rect.w = width
        but.text = self.text

    def draw(self, screen):
        # Blit the text.
        screen.blit(self.txt_surface, (self.rect.x+5, self.rect.y+1))
        # Blit the rect.
        pg.draw.rect(screen, self.color, self.rect, 2)

        self.initial = False
        self.drag_flag = False
        self.show_pos_rect = pygame.Rect(10,20,100,19)
    def show(self):
        pygame.draw.rect(screen,(240,240,240),self.rect,0)
        pygame.draw.rect(screen,(0,0,0),self.rect,2)
        for i in range(lenth(self.text)):
            screen.blit(pygame.font.SysFont(FONTNAME,15).render(self.text[i],True,(0,0,0)),(self.rect.x,self.rect.y+i*15))
        if not self.initial:
            if self.rect.x+self.rect.width > rect.width:
                self.rect.x = rect.width-self.rect.width
            if self.rect.y+self.rect.height > rect.height:
                self.rect.y = rect.height-self.rect.height
            if self.rect.x < 0:
                self.rect.x = 0
            if self.rect.y < 0:
                self.rect.y = 0
    def get_event(self,event):
        if event.type == pygame.MOUSEBUTTONDOWN and self.rect.collidepoint(event.pos):
            self.drag_flag = True
        if self.drag_flag and event.type == pygame.MOUSEBUTTONUP:
            self.drag_flag = False
            if self.initial:
                new_listbox = Listbox()
                new_listbox.rect.x,new_listbox.rect.y = drag_listbox.rect.x,drag_listbox.rect.y
                listbox_list.append(new_listbox)
                drag_listbox.rect.x,drag_listbox.rect.y = select_rect.x+7,select_rect.y+225

            self.rect.center = event.pos
            self.show_pos_rect.x,self.show_pos_rect.y = self.rect.x+self.rect.width,self.rect.y+self.rect.height
            pygame.draw.rect(screen,(200,200,200),self.show_pos_rect,0)
